drivers.note: LOS / ICU / ward / OT-hour / cath-hour percentiles ride the service basis

line_items.name: Cath Lab Charges
line_items.how: Actual billed cath-lab slot-family P25 / P50 / P75 from the selected historical payer basis.

line_items.name: MLC Charges
line_items.how: Applied only when MLC input is Yes

line_items.name: Physician Fees — Daily Visits
line_items.how: Medical management PF — priced from this cohort's billed PF (visit-based); visit-fee rule sheet pending

line_items.name: Cath Lab Hours Residual
line_items.how: Mode-aware grouped residual net of selected child add-ons from same grouping

package.tariff_information:
| Room / Category | Tariff / Detail |
| --- | --- |
| PACKAGE- I | 18,000 |
| PACKAGE- II | 20,000 |
| PACKAGE- III | 22,000 |
package.inclusions_text:
- Hospital Stay - 1 day
- Pharmacy Charges Upto Rs. 5000/- Includes Non Ionic Contrast - 100ml
- ECG 2 Included
- CATH LAB Charges 1/2 Hr
- Cath Consumables (Guide wire, Sheath, Introducer)
- Catheters ( TIG, JL, JR & PIGTAIL)
- Medical Records-1 day
package.exclusions_text:
- Room Charges Extra
- If Patient is shifted to PTCA / CABG, no room charges will be chargeable for CAG
- Cath Profile
- Beyond package days All room rents ,professional fee,investigations and pharmacy etc.
- Additional catheter , wire & sheaths, CD Charges
- High risk charges depend on patient condition
- Cross consultation, non related investigations and non cardiac procedures
- Food & Beverage (attender food and other than diet)
- any other profiles ,CT , & other costly Investigations
- Other Services/Attender room charges (if used)
- HBS AG+ ve, HCV +ve, HIV +ve
- All medications and investigations other than Procedure
- Diabetic Management

---
package.documentation_notes:
Documentation family resolution: CAG CAT-1 uses the Coronary Angiogram documentation. CAT/category is a tariff/variant descriptor, not a separate clinical documentation requirement.
- Tariff/inclusion/exclusion content comes only from clean package-detail markdown.

Previous notes:
- FC History / CORONARY ANGIOGRAM (CAG): Exact match via exact_package_code. Source code exactly equals Package Master PKGCD.
- No package-detail documentation mapped from either markdown source.

---
package.inclusions_text_clean:
- Hospital Stay: 1 day
- Pharmacy: Up to ₹5,000 (includes non-ionic contrast 100ml)
- Investigations: ECG (2)
- OT & Procedure Charges: Cath Lab (0.5 hour)
- Routine Consumables & Nursing: Guidewire, Sheath, Introducer, Catheters (TIG, JL, JR, Pigtail)
- Medical Records: 1 day
package.exclusions_text_clean:
- Room Charges: Not included
- Room charges for Coronary Angiogram (CAG) are waived if the patient's treatment escalates to PTCA or CABG
- Investigations: Cath Profile
- Any stay, services, investigations, or consumables beyond the package duration (charged as per actuals)
- Additional consumables: Catheters, wires, sheaths, CD charges
- High-risk charges (depend on patient condition)
- Cross-specialty consultations, non-related investigations, and non-cardiac procedures
- Attender food & beverages and additional patient orders
- Any other profiles, CT scans, or costly investigations
- Other services or attender room charges (if used)
- HIV, HBsAg & HCV disposable kit
- Any medications or investigations not related to the procedure
- Diabetic management

pf_analysis.reason: PF priced from the historic P50 — the insurer tariff carries token PF rates (15-Jul Q1)

warnings: Stay defaulted to the package master's duration — 1 day for [CAR0122] (pre 0 / post 1); cohort history stays as the reference band.
Medical management — Professional Fees priced from billed physician-fee history (P50 ₹3,600, basis Cash); the visit-based fee sheet will refine this.

admin_msc10.note: MSC10 is administrative, not a procedure.

flags: Daycare never uses a single generic average — price the exact treatment/regimen cohort at current tariff.
Never mix package and open-bill daycare histories.
notes: Daycare is a stay/billing modifier — the treatment/drug drives the cost.

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
